title: M2CContextRequest
description: Request object for the M2CContextSelector.select() call. Controls which media context is selected, at what level, and under what budget and isolation constraints (spec/v0.2/supply.md §3.5 and §7.1).

mediaIds.description: One or more media IDs to retrieve context for

taskType.description: Task type for adaptive level selection

maxTokens.description: Maximum token budget for the entire response

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold. Context with confidence below this value MUST be excluded.

level.description: Explicit level override. When set, bypasses task-adaptive selection.

relevance.description: Per-media relevance scores (0.0–1.0) for budget allocation. Keys are media IDs. Missing entries default to 1.0.

role.description: Consumer role for isolation (default: all roles)

temporalScope.description: Temporal scope filter. Only data within this time range will be included.

modalities.description: Modality filter. Only the specified modalities will be included.
